description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a straight comb and a smooth, polished finish, extending into a long, slender barrel. The receiver and action are constructed from dark metal, contrasting with the warm brown wood of the stock and fore-end. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the action, and the rifle is equipped with traditional iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver. The muzzle end appears to have a simple, unadorned finish without any specialized device attached. The trigger guard and trigger are both metallic, and the overall design suggests a utilitarian, mid-20th-century style suitable for both civilian and military use. The rifle's proportions and materials indicate it is robust and built for reliability.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a polished wood and dark metal finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the end of the stock.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the wooden stock, long barrel, iron sights, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the straight comb of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: A full right-side view displays the trigger, magazine, and the length of the wooden stock and barrel.
